name: Hello
instruction: Extend hand forward · Open palm · Wave gently

name: Good Morning
instruction: Raise flat hand · Move from chin outward

name: Good Evening
instruction: Flat hand drops from chin downward

name: Goodbye
instruction: Open hand · Wave side to side

name: Welcome
instruction: Both arms open wide toward visitor

name: Nice to meet
instruction: Shake both fists together twice

name: How are you
instruction: Point out, then bring hand to chest

name: I am fine
instruction: Thumbs up, move hand forward

name: See you later
instruction: Point, then wave hand away

name: Good night
instruction: Curved hand lowers over opposite arm

name: Please
instruction: Flat hand circles on chest

name: You
instruction: Index finger points directly forward

name: Me
instruction: Index finger points to chest

name: We
instruction: Index sweeps from self to partner

name: They
instruction: Index sweeps away from body

name: Come
instruction: Index finger curls toward body

name: Go
instruction: Index finger points away, flick wrist

name: Here
instruction: Both flat hands point down to ground

name: There
instruction: Index points outward to a location

name: Yes
instruction: Fist nods up and down

name: No
instruction: Index and middle tap thumb twice

name: Maybe
instruction: Both flat hands rock alternately

name: What
instruction: Index fingers tap together, palms out

name: Who
instruction: Index traces circle near mouth
